Log:
  MFC r188492:

@@ -186,7 +186,7 @@ g_label_msdosfs_taste(struct g_consumer 
 				    FAT_DES_ATTR_VOLUME_ID) {
 					strlcpy(label, pfat_entry->DIR_Name,
 					    MIN(size,
-					    sizeof(pfat_bsbpb->BS_VolLab) + 1));
+					    sizeof(pfat_entry->DIR_Name) + 1));
 					goto endofchecks;
 				}
 			} while((uint8_t *)(++pfat_entry) <
